title: Google OAuth Login Success
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in using Google OAuth authentication and is directed to the main dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Click on Google OAuth login button.
Complete authentication with valid Google credentials.
Verify user is authenticated and redirected to the main dashboard.
Verify user session is established and user-specific data is loaded.

title: Google OAuth Login Failure Handling
description: Verify that the system correctly handles Google OAuth login failure scenarios such as incorrect credentials or canceled authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Click on Google OAuth login button.
Abort or enter invalid credentials during Google OAuth flow.
Verify login failure message is shown to the user.
Verify user is not redirected to dashboard and no session is created.

title: Create V1 Recipe and Generate V2 Techcard
description: Ensure users can create a new V1 free-form recipe, submit it to AI generation, and receive a valid structured V2 technical card.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to techcard creation page.
Input a free-form recipe description (V1 format).
Trigger AI-powered generation to produce a structured V2 techcard.
Verify the returned techcard contains all required fields including ingredients, portions, and article allocations.
Verify no errors or missing fields are present and the techcard passes strict validation rules.

title: Techcard Ingredient to IIKO Article Auto-Mapping
description: Verify that the AI engine automatically assigns real IIKO article codes to ingredient entries without collisions and differentiates system-generated placeholders.

steps.description: Generate or import a techcard with multiple ingredients.
Trigger auto-mapping of ingredients to IIKO catalog items.
Verify each ingredient is assigned either a unique real IIKO article code or a system-generated placeholder.
Verify no article code collisions occur in the assignment.
Verify the mapping is persisted in the techcard data.

title: Convert V1 Recipes to Structured V2 Techcards
description: Test the conversion process that transforms free-form V1 recipes into structured and compliant V2 techcards compatible with IIKO requirements.

steps.description: Import or create a V1 recipe in the system.
Initiate the conversion from V1 to V2 techcard.
Verify the converted V2 techcard contains structured ingredient lists, portions, and mappings.
Verify converted techcard passes all quality validations.

title: Menu Creation and Management with AI Assistance
description: Verify users can create, edit, and manage menus including adding AI-generated dishes and perform all menu operations through the React frontend.

steps.description: Navigate to the menu management view.
Create a new menu by specifying required fields.
Add multiple dishes, including AI-generated techcards, to the menu.
Edit dish details, update portions, and remove items from the menu.
Verify menu updates are saved and reflected immediately in the UI.

title: Nutritional and Cost Calculations Accuracy
description: Confirm that nutritional information and cost calculations for dishes and ingredients are accurately computed and displayed.

steps.description: Create or import a techcard with detailed ingredient list and portions.
Trigger nutrition and cost calculation modules.
Verify nutritional values match expected outputs from the nutrition catalog.
Verify cost calculations consider ingredient prices correctly.
Verify calculated information is properly shown in the UI.

title: Export Functionality: Generate and Download Multi-format Files
description: Verify users can trigger export of techcards and menus into multiple formats (XLSX, PDF, HTML, ZIP) ready for IIKO RMS upload, and download the generated files without errors.

steps.description: Select one or multiple techcards and/or menus for export.
Initiate the export process.
Verify preflight checks detect and alert if any mappings or data are missing.
Verify export completes generating XLSX, PDF, HTML files and ZIP archive.
Verify all files conform to expected format and include required data for IIKO RMS compatibility.
Download the export package and verify file integrity.

title: User Data Isolation and Security
description: Ensure that data queries, UI views, and backend API responses isolate data strictly per user, and no user can access another user's information.

steps.description: Log in as User A and create several techcards and menus.
Log out and log in as User B.
Attempt to access techcards, menus, or API endpoints belonging to User A.
Verify User B cannot access or view User A's data through UI or API.
Verify error responses or empty results are returned when unauthorized access is attempted.

title: Integration with IIKO Cloud API: Catalog Import and Error Handling
description: Test the integration with IIKO Cloud API, including importing product catalogs and handling scenarios where API is unavailable or returns errors.

steps.description: Trigger import of product catalog from IIKO RMS API.
Verify catalog data is correctly imported and mapped internally.
Simulate IIKO API downtime or error responses.
Verify system shows appropriate fallback messages and user alerts.
Verify system retries or handles the error gracefully without crashing.

title: Frontend UI Loading and Error States for AI Generation
description: Verify that the React frontend correctly displays loading indicators, disables inputs during AI generation requests, and shows error messages on failure.

steps.description: Initiate AI generation for a new techcard.
Verify a loading spinner or indicator is shown and user inputs are disabled.
Simulate AI generation failure or timeout.
Verify user is shown a clear error message.
Verify user can retry or cancel the operation.

title: Quality Validation of User-submitted and AI-generated Techcards
description: Confirm that both AI-generated and manually edited techcards undergo strict quality validation before saving or export.

steps.description: Create or import a techcard with missing required fields or invalid data.
Attempt to save or export the techcard.
Verify validation errors are detected and prevent saving/export.
Correct the errors and resubmit.
Verify techcard passes strict validation and save or export succeeds.

title: Logging and Debugging Event Tracking
description: Verify that key user actions and errors during AI generation, export, and integrations are logged properly in backend logs and frontend console messages.

steps.description: Perform AI generation, export, and integration operations.
Verify backend logs capture relevant events, warnings, and errors.
Verify frontend console/log displays appropriate informational and error messages.

title: Performance of AI Generation and Export Operations
description: Ensure that AI generation requests and export processing complete within acceptable time thresholds under normal load and that concurrency controls on AI endpoints prevent overload.

steps.description: Trigger multiple AI generation requests sequentially and concurrently.
Verify response times meet defined performance benchmarks.
Verify system prevents multiple concurrent AI requests from the same user.
Initiate export of large sets of techcards and menus.
Verify export completes within acceptable time and CPU/memory usage is stable.
